---
title: 'AFFILIATE BLOCK TEMPLATE'
date: '2022-03-19T20:59:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'NoHiding.Faith'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_page_id: '2067510557540137715'
blogger_filename: '/p/affiliate-block-template.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/NoHiding.Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p>Here is the link to the w3Schools template:</p><p><a href="https://www.w3schools.com/howto/howto_css_product_card.asp">https://www.w3schools.com/howto/howto_css_product_card.asp</a></p><p>and the Try it now builder:</p><p><a href="https://www.w3schools.com/howto/tryit.asp?filename=tryhow_css_product_card" target="_blank">https://www.w3schools.com/howto/tryit.asp?filename=tryhow_css_product_card </a><br /></p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>Switch to HTML View to see this: <br /></p><p>
  
  
     <! â€“â€“ NT Wright Link â€“â€“>
<div class="card">
  <img alt="Book" src="/images/imported/images-na-ssl-images-amazon-com/417qkgrllvl-sx334-bo1-204-203-200-849d9cb00615.jpg" style="width: 100%;" />
  <h1>A must have for your theological library.</h1>
  <p class="price">Amazon</p>
  <p> The New Testament in Its World: An Introduction to the History, Literature, and Theology of the First Christians, by NT Wright.</p>
  <p><button>   <a href="https://amzn.to/3qj1Zm5">BUY NOW!</a></button></p>
</div>
  <! â€“â€“ NT Wright Link â€“â€“>
  
  
  
  
  /*start*/

<html>
<head>
<style>
.card {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
  max-width: 300px;
  margin: auto;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: arial;
}

.price {
  color: grey;
  font-size: 22px;
}

.card button {
  border: none;
  outline: 0;
  padding: 12px;
  color: white;
  background-color: #FF9900; /* Amazon Orange */
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 18px;
}

.card button:hover {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h2 style="text-align: center;">Theological Library Suggestion</h2>

<div class="card">
  <img alt="Book" src="/images/imported/images-na-ssl-images-amazon-com/417qkgrllvl-sx334-bo1-204-203-200-849d9cb00615.jpg" style="width: 100%;" />
  <h1>A must have for your theological library.</h1>
  <p class="price">Amazon</p>
  <p> The New Testament in Its World: An Introduction to the History, Literature, and Theology of the First Christians, by NT Wright.</p>
  <p><button>   <a href="https://amzn.to/3qj1Zm5">BUY NOW!</a></button></p>
</div>

</body>
</html>
/*end*/&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>Button creator</p><p><a href="https://www.w3schools.com/css/css3_buttons.asp">https://www.w3schools.com/css/css3_buttons.asp</a></p><p>&nbsp;try now builder</p><p><a href="https://www.w3schools.com/css/tryit.asp?filename=trycss_buttons_color">https://www.w3schools.com/css/tryit.asp?filename=trycss_buttons_color</a><br /></p><p>&nbsp; <br /></p>
  
  
  /*start*/
  
  
<html>
<head>
<style>
.card {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
  max-width: 300px;
  margin: auto;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: arial;
}

.price {
  color: grey;
  font-size: 22px;
}

.card button {
  border: none;
  outline: 0;
  padding: 12px;
  color: white;
  background-color: #FF9900; /* Amazon Orange */
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 18px;
}

.card button:hover {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="card">
  <p><button>Buy Now!</button></p>
</div>

</body>
</html>
 
  
  
  
  /*end*/

/Rabbi/
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<style>
.card {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
  max-width: 300px;
  margin: auto;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: arial;
}

.price {
  color: grey;
  font-size: 22px;
}

.card button {
  border: none;
  outline: 0;
  padding: 12px;
  color: white;
  background-color: #4CAF50; /* Green */
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: 18px;
}

.card button:hover {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<h2 style="text-align:center">Theological Library Suggestion</h2>

<div class="card">
  <img src="/images/imported/images-na-ssl-images-amazon-com/5181ykmxrol-sx326-bo1-204-203-200-db9dff8fb054.jpg" alt="Book" style="width:100%">
  <h1>A must have for your theological library.</h1>
  <p class="price">Amazon</p>
  <p> Sitting at the Feet of Rabbi Jesus: How the Jewishness of Jesus Can Transform Your Faith, by  Ann Spangler (Author) & Lois Tverberg (Author) 
  .</p>
  <p><button>
    <a href="https://amzn.to/36dh2H5">BUY NOW!</a>
  </button></p>
</div>

</body>
</html>


/end rabbi/
